g.title: leaderContract
g.text:
<<core interface>>
LeaderElector
+ runIfLeader(lockName): T?
+ runAsyncIfLeader(lockName)
+ state(lockName): LeaderState

g.title: suspendContract
g.text:
<<core suspend interface>>
SuspendLeaderElector
+ suspend runIfLeader(lockName)
+ runIfLeaderResultSuspend(slot)
coroutine context handle

g.title: groupContract
g.text:
<<core group interface>>
LeaderGroupElector
+ maxLeaders: Int
+ runIfLeader(lockName): T?
+ activeCount / availableSlots

g.title: suspendGroupContract
g.text:
<<core suspend group>>
SuspendLeaderGroupElector
+ maxLeaders: Int
+ suspend runIfLeader(lockName)
+ state(lockName): LeaderGroupState

g.title: zkLeader
g.text:
<<blocking + async implementation>>
ZooKeeperLeaderElector
CuratorFramework client
mutex recipe per lock path
acquire(waitTimeMs)
watchdog disabled by design

g.title: mutex
g.text:
<<single lock primitive>>
Curator Mutex Recipe
path from ZooKeeperPaths
acquire(wait, MILLISECONDS)
release in finally block
ephemeral recipe nodes

g.title: zkSuspend
g.text:
<<coroutine implementation>>
ZooKeeperSuspendLeaderElector
single-thread owner dispatcher
blocking acquire/release bridge
NonCancellable cleanup
closes dispatcher after run

g.title: ownerThread
g.text:
<<Curator thread ownership>>
Call-Scoped Owner Thread
new single-thread dispatcher
daemon zookeeper-suspend-leader-*
acquire/release same owner thread
dispatcher closed after cleanup

g.title: zkGroup
g.text:
<<semaphore group implementation>>
ZooKeeperLeaderGroupElector
Curator semaphore recipe
acquire Lease within waitTime
participantNodes activeCount
lease.nodeName becomes slotId

g.title: slotDelegates
g.text:
<<lease state delegates>>
Slot Extend Delegates
ZooKeeperSlotExtendDelegate
ZooKeeperSuspendSlotExtendDelegate
AtomicBoolean released flag
markReleased -> NotHeld

g.title: semaphore
g.text:
<<group permit primitive>>
Curator Semaphore Recipe
path from ZooKeeperPaths
maxLeaders permits
Lease nodeName used as slotId
Lease.close releases permit

g.title: zkSuspendGroup
g.text:
<<coroutine semaphore group>>
ZooKeeperSuspend Group
ZooKeeperSuspendLeaderGroupElector
Dispatchers.IO acquire
NonCancellable lease.close
markReleased before close

g.title: runtime
g.text:
<<session-backed coordination>>
ZooKeeper Runtime Semantics
ZooKeeper session owns liveness
session expiry removes recipe nodes
leaseTime is not ZooKeeper TTL
autoExtend warning but disabled

g.title: paths
g.text:
<<base path builder>>
ZooKeeperPaths
default /leader-election
default /leader-group-election
trims trailing slash
root base becomes /{lockName}
